caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and glasses performs in front of a light-colored slatted wall. He wears a white button-down shirt with a wide open collar, a black vest featuring blue floral embroidery, and a red beaded necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a stand, playing an acoustic guitar. The heads of several audience members are visible in the foreground, partially obscuring the bottom of the scene. The word "ORCA" appears in white text on a black rectangular background in the lower right of the shot. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in place, singing into the microphone while his hands move slightly to play the guitar. The camera angle and lighting remain constant, with only minor shifts in the man's facial expression and the position of his fingers on the instrument as the performance continues.
